message:
feat(core,ssh): add arena registry sync for scrollback tracking and SSH stdin test

Add FleetScrollbackCoordinator::sync_to_arena_registry() bridging tiered
scrollback memory estimates with per-pane arena accounting. Enables tracking
of evicted cold-tier pages as they transition between storage tiers (ft-3axa).
Includes integration tests for registered and unregistered pane behavior.

Add collect_exec_result_with_input() helper for stdin-driven SSH execs and
exec_should_echo_stdin_and_allow_followup_exec test validating stdin roundtrip
and session recovery after stdin-driven exec completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
